description: Create crates/oai-runner/src/runner/ module with agent_loop.rs and output.rs. Agent loop: send messages to API with tools and stream:true, stream response printing text chunks to stdout, if tool_calls present execute each tool and append results to conversation then continue loop, if only content then done, max_turns limit prevents infinite loops. Output formatting: text printed directly (becomes OutputChunk), tool calls as JSON lines with type:tool_call format, thinking in XML tags, metadata JSON at end with tokens/cost. Phase decision text emitted naturally by model - orchestrator parse_phase_decision_from_text handles extraction.
title: Implement multi-turn agent loop and output formatting
